sentences.text: Good morning, Yui!
Hello!
How are you?
Doing well, yourself?
Good, I'm doing well.
It's hard to complain on a Friday, so….
Granny.
So I'm doing… I am doing well.
Yes, no complaints on my end.
How have you been since we met last June?
Anything new in your world?
We acquired a bunch of new properties that we're working on getting set up, but other than that, pretty standard, I guess.
Okay, that's exciting.
So, with the acquisition of new properties, then, how many do y'all have in total now?
Okay, okay, got it.
And I… our, … I did take a peek at the website.
Remind me, are y'all mostly third party, or do you own and manage any of those properties?
We do own and manage some, but mostly third-party.
Okay, okay, got it.
And then, if I'm not mistaken, y'all are mostly affordable in, senior….
Affordable, a lot of senior.
Okay, a lot of affordable, a lot of senior.
Okay.
Okay, got it.
And then, as far as… I remember last year, like, you were super happy with your MarTech stack.
I know Place for Mom is really important for y'all.
But I guess today, I think it would make most sense just to focus on Google Business Profile Automation.
Is that on your radar at all, or were you just open to seeing how it looks, since we've updated a few things?
It's… it's something that we already do, to some extent, with Sumper.
Okay.
Okay, got it.
When did you bring on Zumper?
We did… A big change on that one for…
We had some of them last year, and then we ended up adding all of them on earlier this year, but that was for listing management.
The Google posting is only on some of the communities.
Okay, okay, so Zumper helps with listing management for all 24, 25 properties, and then, you said that there are a handful that Zumper does the postings on as well?
Okay, okay, perfect.
What, I guess, specifically does Umber do that kind of made y'all want to roll that out?
They did a lot of syndication for us, we're trying to make sure our information's correct everywhere.
Okay.
Okay, so information standardized to Google is important to you.
… Let's see, as far as any other profiles, I guess, that you would be interested in rolling out a Google Business Profile automation tool, too?
Are there any remaining, or with those new properties that are being brought on, do y'all have… A few that are not currently being optimized by a third party?
Yes.
A lot of the affordable sites aren't doing it, just because of cost-wise.
Yeah.
Okay.
Okay, got it.
And I guess as far as choosing the properties that you did to post, what kind of made you choose those properties for Zumper to do both the listings management and the postings?
They just need a little bit more of a boost.
Okay, a little bit more of a boost.
Okay, got it.
Alright, and are y'all still using RealPage?
We are.
Okay, okay, perfect.
Alright, well then, I will show you what's new over here.
I know that you, of course, utilize Rentables ILS.

officially rebranded our SEO side of things, just to kind of make it a little bit more, I guess… you know, so many people are kind of clumping our Google Business Profile Automation tool into, like, kind of a lead-generating tool, and like you said, it's a great tool to help standardize that information to your profiles, and then, of course, help with an SEO lift.

So, yes, since we spoke last, we now have a new name, so we're Maven AI, but, we've also rolled out a few updates with the tool as well, so… When it comes to Google, Google still does dominate search.
About 92% of searches are done on Google.

So, with that being said, when prospective residents or the adult child is looking for a new, home for their parent, your Google business profiles are super important in making sure that they can get as much information from the profile, as well as kind of get a nice picture of what it's like to live at the property as well.
So we, of course, make sure that, digital curb appeal is, optimized on the profile, as well as getting that content standardized on Google.
But then additionally, Google's going to reward profiles with, relevant, frequent, and unique content to the profile with a little SEO lift.
I don't know if you've seen this, but in 2025, Google has made even more of an emphasis on, increasing local SEO with the optimization of a Google Business profile, whether it be manual or automated.
So, it's been really fun to see this tool kind of continue to evolve.
We really wanted to roll this tool out because we hear more and more about diminishing manpower across marketing teams.
Oftentimes, marketing teams are being asked for stronger results.

With fewer resources, on-site teams are overburdened, so anytime they're tasked with marketing things, a lot of times they're not able to get to them, and then ultimately the renter experience is not standardized.
So… The way that our tool works is we're going to integrate with RealPage to do 4 things on your profiles daily.
So, first and foremost, we're going to leverage your photos of the property and AI to, highlight the amenities, as well as any keywords, any branding that's important to you.
We, of course, would align on the front end on that.
to just, again, paint that picture, we pull over the live pricing and availability for, your available floor plans.
Will you remind me, in Michigan, is fee transparency a big thing yet, or am I… I know there's a state up, is it Minneapolis?
Minnesota?
transparency?
Yeah, yeah, fee transparency is becoming a big thing.
It's required in a few states.
I believe it's New Hampshire, California, and … yeah, Minnesota is looking at it, but y'all are strictly Michigan, is that correct?
Yeah, yeah, we're just Michigan.

The only thing I have close to a fee transparency is we have a couple cities that pass application ordinances where we have to be, we have to list our… Pricing for the application, and how we derived it.

Okay, yeah, so that's exactly, what is, yeah, what we're making sure that we implement, because we do know that that is, again, a requirement for a few states, and kind of becoming the norm a little bit, in this world of fee transparency, which, you know, as an end user is great, so, that's something that we absolutely know is important, and can break that down as needed.
We also manage your Q&A feed, and then we highlight concessions and specials anytime they are available.
Any questions before I show you what this looks like on a profile?
So, when you say manage the Q&A feed, is it responding for it, or is it telling me, hey, someone asked a question?
So, what we actually do… here, we can start there.
So, what we've done on the Q&A feed is we saw that oftentimes a question would be asked by a potential resident and either never answered or answered, like, months later.
So, what we've done to even get ahead of a prospective resident needing to ask a question is we place up to 20 questions.
This would, again, be something that we allow Line on the front end.

on the profile, and then we edit the answer daily, to make sure we reflect that accurate information, but then also make sure that we are capitalizing on that SEO lift that Google will give you for optimizing the profile.
So… These questions are going to be about office hours, pet policy, amenities, concessions and specials will also show up here, as well as availability.
So, that is how we've approached this, because again, ideally.
If you have all this information listed, no one will even need to ask a question.
So we looked at the most frequently asked questions.
These… this is what we gathered were most frequently asked in multifamily Google business profiles, and this is how we came up with those questions.
Pretty cool.
Yeah Alright, so that is the Q&A feed.
And then we'll go back to this here.
So, as far as the products feed, so, again, we're gonna integrate directly with RealPage, one site, to make sure that we are properly reflecting your, available floor plans.
We can also showcase the unavailable floor plans if you choose.
But we'll pull this over once a day with the starting price.

If you click in, it's gonna give a little bit more in-depth look of what that floor plan entails, and then ultimately, if the prospective resident is interested in gathering more information, we take them directly to your property website landing pages.
So that is that, and let me see how easily… I was actually looking at… A profile with fee transparency yesterday.
So here's a look at what this looks like.
So, yes, Minnesota, it's becoming very important for them to have those, fee transparency, so if you click in, here is what that fee transparency looks like for us.
Okay, yeah, so then the residents are always, or prospects are always just aware of what's going on and what the costs are.
Yep, exactly.
I guess while we're also here, something that we can do on the products and availability feed as well is highlight any in-unit and community amenities as well.
So that is a new feature of our tool as well.
So then, lastly, we have the daily posts.
So, again, what we do here is we use your photos that are in RealPage One site, and then we, leverage AI to speak to what is being shown in the photos.
We, of course, want to use as many amenity-rich keywords as possible, so that when someone who is searching for apartments near me with a fitness center, you're more likely to come up in that search.

Also, in this time of AI that we live in that is so strange, I don't know if you've seen those new overviews when you do a Google search, but these posts are so important now with that as well, just because what AI is going to do is scrape these posts, and then, when it does come up with an AI overview of the property or what have you, you have all those amenities listed, in that little overview that it'll populate.
Yeah, it's been pretty interesting to see how people optimize for it.
It is so weird.
I honestly… look, I love this tool, because obviously I'm all about, working smarter and not harder, but in this world of AI, I am freaked out.
It is evolving way too quickly, and… yeah, some people have AI in their hands that I'm like, I don't like that.

So anyway, the last piece on this… We post about concessions and specials when they're available, so I don't know if you saw in that Q&A feed, we did have a little piece there, but, we'll additionally post about concessions and specials once a week while they're being offered.
And then once the special expires, so August 31st, these posts will be deleted.
So, … Oh, sorry, go ahead.
I said, nice, that's pretty handy, that I don't have to worry about it, it just posts it for me automatically for those specials.
Yeah, yeah, exactly.
And then I know that you kind of mentioned, you know, brand standardization being important, so yes, there are several ways that we can further optimize, your brand language even more.
We do have the ability to connect with your websites.
And then our, … large language learning model will pick up on your verbiage, and then start creating the posts a little bit more specific to your brand guidelines, if that's important to y'all.
I know that some properties, it's a big thing.
For others, it's not too, too big of a thing.
But yes, that is… An updated look at our tool, the starting price is $200 a month of property.
I'd be happy to bring that down to $150 as an existing rental.
partner, and then, of course, we can offer volume discounts, but, especially with Zumper in place, like, what are your thoughts on this tool?
It seems handy.
It definitely seems like something I could utilize for some of my market rate communities.
Not so much my affordable, just because more often than not, they are more constricted on their Marketing dollars, but….
Yeah, absolutely.
I can't really do too much right now.
I usually have to add on things for the following year, but if you want to send the information over to me, I can review it with my VP and get her thoughts on it.
Yeah!
That we want to, swap over to.
Okay, perfect.
So a few questions on that.
I know you said for the next year, so when do y'all typically budget and roll out new tools?
I budget now.
Okay.
And I roll out new things in the beginning of the year.
Okay.
Okay, got it.
Well, please know something that we can also offer as an existing rental partner is, delayed billing for a few months.
To make sure that we're not only not, of course, overlapping with your Zumper, tools, but then, of course, get y'all up and running before we even are in the new year.
So, something to keep in mind there.
And then, how many rate market rate properties do y'all have?
If you want to shoot me an email, I can send you a breakdown of our communities that are market rate or mixed rate.
Okay, okay, perfect, because yeah, again, we can offer volume discounts, so I'd be more than happy to work with you on that.

So I will send over this recap, and then, yes, I will be in touch, I'll send over some value-add, you know, little pieces, but then, would there be a good time to follow up with you, Just to kind of get a pulse check.
Probably mid-September.
My, VP's out right now on surgery, so she gets back at the beginning soon, and then, once she's back, I'll be able to let her get acclimated and then touch base with her.
Okay, that makes sense to me.
Alright, well then I will send everything over.
Let me know if, of course, either of y'all have any follow-up questions, and then, I will be in touch in September.
Sounds great.
Thanks, Colby.
Yeah, thank you, Yui.
Have a good one.
You too, bye.
Bye.
